title: gochnatia paniculata var. lanuginosa
intro: Gochnatia paniculata var. lanuginosa, also known as the woolly gochnatia, is a plant species within the Asteraceae family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with this plant include the potential treatment of various ailments such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and topical applications, allowing for various methods of consumption and use.
